{{CargoClone
|name=Baboon General
|rank=purple
|cabin=2
|id=92
|gene1={race} DEF +30
|gene2={race} FAME +30
|gene3=Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:
> Troop DEF +8
|gene4=Refine +1 Green Gaia Material +1%
|gene5=Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:
> Troop DEF +12
|gene6=Refine +1 Green Gaia Material +1.5%
|}}
